requirement_topic.en: MOIT / EVN Storage and Grid-Connection Review
requirement_topic.zh: 工贸部 / EVN储能与并网审查
requirement_topic.zht: 工貿部 / EVN儲能與併網審查

summary.en: Grid-connected BESS projects in Vietnam should be assessed against the electricity-law, power-development-plan, MOIT technical rules, and EVN or network-operator grid-connection process applicable to the project voltage, role, and location. Storage may be reviewed as part of a generation, renewable-energy, transmission, distribution, or customer-side project rather than under a single standalone BESS product approval.
summary.zh: 越南并网BESS项目应根据适用于项目电压等级、角色和地点的电力法律、电力发展规划、工贸部技术规则以及EVN或电网运营方并网流程进行评估。储能可能作为发电、可再生能源、输电、配电或用户侧项目的一部分接受审查，而不是依据单一独立BESS产品批准。
summary.zht: 越南併網BESS項目應根據適用於項目電壓等級、角色和地點的電力法律、電力發展規劃、工貿部技術規則以及EVN或電網營運方併網流程進行評估。儲能可能作為發電、可再生能源、輸電、配電或用戶側項目的一部分接受審查，而不是依據單一獨立BESS產品批准。

standards_or_laws: MOIT technical regulations and circulars for power-system connection and operation
EVN / network-operator grid-connection requirements for the project

summary.en: China project files often include GB/T 36558-2023 system requirements, GB/T 36276-2023 battery evidence, GB 44240-2024 safety evidence, grid-model data, protection settings, PCS certificates, and dispatch interface documents. These can support Vietnamese review but must be converted to the MOIT / EVN project connection format and local language expectations.
summary.zh: 中国项目文件通常包括GB/T 36558-2023系统要求、GB/T 36276-2023电池证据、GB 44240-2024安全证据、电网模型数据、保护定值、PCS证书和调度接口文件。这些资料可支持越南审查，但必须转换为工贸部/EVN项目并网格式和当地语言要求。
summary.zht: 中國項目文件通常包括GB/T 36558-2023系統要求、GB/T 36276-2023電池證據、GB 44240-2024安全證據、電網模型資料、保護定值、PCS證書和調度接口文件。這些資料可支持越南審查，但必須轉換為工貿部/EVN項目併網格式和當地語言要求。

gap.en: The gap is local grid acceptance. Exporters should prepare single-line diagrams, protection studies, power-quality data, PCS grid-code functions, active and reactive power controls, communication protocols, commissioning tests, and operating procedures for EVN, the relevant network operator, and the Vietnamese project owner.
gap.zh: 差距在于当地电网接受。出口商应为EVN、相关电网运营方和越南项目业主准备一次接线图、保护研究、电能质量数据、PCS电网规范功能、有功/无功控制、通信协议、调试试验和运行程序。
gap.zht: 差距在於當地電網接受。出口商應為EVN、相關電網營運方和越南項目業主準備一次接線圖、保護研究、電能品質資料、PCS電網規範功能、有功/無功控制、通訊協定、調試試驗和運行程序。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the BESS is grid-connected or forms part of a licensed / approved power project; exact instruments and evidence depend on voltage level, connection point, project role, and EVN or network-operator review
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific for Chinese grid-connected storage projects; GB/T 36558-2023 is commonly used as system-level technical evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A China GB technical file does not equal Vietnam grid acceptance. Grid-connected BESS projects need MOIT / EVN and network-operator review evidence matched to the project connection point.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB技术档案不等同于越南电网接受。并网BESS项目需要与项目接入点匹配的工贸部/EVN及电网运营方审查证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB技術檔案不等同於越南電網接受。併網BESS項目需要與項目接入點匹配的工貿部/EVN及電網營運方審查證據。
